Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's core focus on M&A and corporate restructuring aims to '提昇企業價值' (increase corporate value), driving economic productivity and growth (Targets 8.1, 8.2). It also touches on entrepreneurship (Target 8.3) and financial services.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly addresses industrial upgrading and innovation through M&A, with readings on 'Technology centrality' and 'Innovation Activities' (Target 9.5), and the overall theme of '企業重組與購併' impacting industrial structure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course tangentially relates to Target 10.5 by discussing '金融管制' (financial regulation) and '反托拉斯法' (anti-trust law), which are policies for market fairness and can indirectly reduce economic inequalities.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course covers '購併法規,內線交易' (M&A regulations, insider trading) and '反托拉斯法' (anti-trust law), supporting the rule of law (Target 16.3), reducing illicit financial flows (Target 16.4), and promoting transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
